# MDLMaterialTextureFilterMode

**Enumeration**

Modes for sampling textures at coordinates between texels, used by the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTextureFilter/minFilter] and [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTextureFilter/magFilter] properties.

## Declaration

```swift
enum MDLMaterialTextureFilterMode
```

## Constants

- **MDLMaterialTextureFilterMode.nearest**: Sampling at texture coordinates between texels should return the value of the nearest texel.
- **MDLMaterialTextureFilterMode.linear**: Sampling at texture coordinates between texels should linearly interpolate between texel values.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Constants

- **MDLMaterialTextureWrapMode**: Modes for sampling textures at coordinates outside the texture bounds, used by the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTextureFilter/sWrapMode], [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTextureFilter/tWrapMode], and [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTextureFilter/rWrapMode] properties.
- **MDLMaterialMipMapFilterMode**: Modes for sampling textures at sizes between mipmap levels, used by the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTextureFilter/mipFilter] property.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
